sglang.title: [CI] Add CI Testing for Prefill-Decode Disaggregation with Router
sglang.author: key4ng
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR introduces comprehensive CI testing for SGLang's prefill-decode disaggregation mode with router functionality. As disaggregation becomes a critical feature for scaling large language models across multiple GPUs with RDMA communication, we need automated testing to ensure:

Reliabi

sglang.author: JustinTong0323
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Updates the transformers dependency to version 4.53.0 and adds timm as a required dependency.
The Gemma attention layer logic now correctly identifies sliding window attention based on layer types, rather than a hardcoded pattern.

sglang.title: Fix: Minicpm
sglang.author: JustinTong0323
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
A factor in transformers causes an error in SGLang's minicpmo's implementation.

huggingface/transformers#38235

This PR fix that.

Modifications
Fixes an issue where the WHISPER_ATTENTION_CLASSES dictionary was being used to access attention classes, which is outdated. This commit direct

sglang.title: Hybrid kv cache for LLaMA4
sglang.author: RunkaiTao
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
LLaMA 4 uses local attention in 3/4 of its layers. To accommodate this, we divide the KV cache into two parts: a global cache and a local cache. Determining the optimal ratio between their sizes is nontrivial, so we introduce a tunable parameter p, where 0 ≤ p ≤ 1.

When p = 1, the ratio

sglang.title: [CPU] add optimizations for INT8 and FP8 DeepSeek
sglang.author: chunyuan-w
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Call the below kernels in DeepSeek to optimize INT8 and FP8:
INT8 linear: int8_scaled_mm_with_quant
FP8 linear: fp8_scaled_mm
INT8 and FP8 shared_expert: shared_expert_cpu
INT8 and FP8 MoE: fused_experts_cpu
For bmm, currently we don't support weight to be FP8, we convert weight to BF16 (

sglang.title: [BUG] fix local_rank in initialize_dp_attention
sglang.author: TomQuartz
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
While initializing the GroupCoordinator, local_rank is used to bind device. However, for DP attention, the _ATTN_TP_GROUP GroupCoordinator is given the tp_rank or tp_rank % (tp_size // dp_size) as local_rank, which may exceeds the number of devices on the node or map multiple DP attention

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Mark 'hidden_states' as mutable in moe_forward registration.
vllm.author: bnellnm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Mark hidden_states as mutable in moe_forward registration.  The inplace option on fused_experts can cause hidden_states to sometimes get mutated when calling moe_forward.
This fixes a test failure in tests/models/language/generation/test_common.py::test_models[False-5-32-TitanML/tiny-mixtral] introd
